title: 1hrPVTdataset_allSubjects
description: This dataset comprises scalp EEG recordings from healthy adult participants during a one-hour psychomotor vigilance task under three stimulation conditions: 40 Hz audiovisual flicker, no flicker control, and randomized flicker sham stimulation. The study investigates the effects of flickering sensory stimulation on sustained attention and vigilance performance.
methods_description: Scalp EEG activity was recorded during a one-hour psychomotor vigilance task. Participants were exposed to one of three conditions: 40 Hz audiovisual flicker stimulation, no flicker control condition, or randomized flicker as sham stimulation.
